title: Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/CDK)
description: Master Infrastructure as Code (IaC) principles using tools like Terraform or AWS CDK. Architect reproducible cloud environments by managing declarative modules, state files, and multi-environment deployments.
objectives: Master Infrastructure as Code (IaC) principles using tools like Terraform or AWS CDK.
Architect reproducible cloud environments by managing declarative modules, state files, and multi-environment deployments.
